prompt: Blend the typewriter’s keys texture into the text fill and add slight paper-edge vignette.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1 (the book cover) by applying the worn, circular, and metallic texture of the typewriter keys from Image 2 to the fill of the text "OUT OF THE BLUE" and "SOPHIE CAMERON". This texture should be subtly blended into the existing text. Additionally, add a slight paper-edge-style vignette to Image 1, creating a soft, aged darkening effect around its periphery.
objects: Text "OUT OF THE BLUE" with worn, circular, metallic fill
Text "SOPHIE CAMERON" with worn, circular, metallic fill
Soft, aged darkening vignette around the periphery
